hero.title: Travel China with clearer answers, better payments, and fewer surprises
hero.description:
TravelTang is built for international visitors coming to China.
Get practical PDF guides for Alipay and WeChat Pay setup, city-by-city travel planning, and an AI assistant for real travel questions.

announcement.title: New: China payment setup guide + city travel PDF bundle

introduce.title: What TravelTang sells

items.title: China Payments PDF

items.title: AI Travel Chatbot
items.description: Ask questions about payments, trains, SIM cards, hotels, local apps, and trip planning in one place.

items.title: Built for Foreign Visitors
items.description: The product is written around the friction international travelers actually face when visiting China.

benefits.title: Why travelers use TravelTang
benefits.label: Benefits
benefits.description: The product focuses on the parts of a China trip that usually create confusion before arrival and after landing.

items.title: Clearer payment setup before departure

items.title: Practical city guides, not generic inspiration

items.title: Instant answers while traveling
items.description: The chatbot gives travelers a fast place to ask follow-up questions when plans change or a local workflow is confusing.

testimonials.title: What travelers say about TravelTang
testimonials.description: Feedback from international visitors who used the guides and travel assistant before or during a China trip.

items.name: Emma Wilson
items.quote: The payment PDF saved me a lot of trial and error. I set up Alipay before landing and avoided the usual first-day payment confusion.

items.name: Daniel Park
items.quote: The city guide was much more practical than general travel blogs. It focused on transport, apps, and what I actually needed on the ground.

items.name: Sofia Martinez
items.quote: I used the chatbot during the trip when train bookings and local apps became confusing. It was faster than searching through scattered forum answers.

items.name: Liam Chen
items.quote: The combined package made sense for us. We used the PDFs before departure and the chatbot after arriving when we had more detailed questions.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.description: Questions travelers usually ask before paying.

items.question: What is included in the PDF package?
items.answer: The PDF package includes two paid guides: one for setting up Alipay and WeChat Pay as an international visitor, and one with city travel guidance for China trips.

items.question: Is the chatbot only about payments?
items.answer: No. The chatbot is for broader China travel questions, including payments, transport, booking habits, local apps, trip planning, and common traveler confusion.

items.question: Who is TravelTang for?
items.answer: It is built for overseas travelers coming to China who need clearer practical guidance, especially around digital payments and on-the-ground travel logistics.

items.question: Can I buy just the PDFs without chatbot access?
items.answer: Yes. The pricing page can offer a PDF-only option, chatbot access, and a combined package.

items.question: When should I use the guides?
items.answer: The payment guide is most useful before departure. The city guide helps before and during the trip, while the chatbot is useful whenever new questions come up.

items.question: Does TravelTang replace official travel providers or booking platforms?
items.answer: No. TravelTang is a guidance product. It helps travelers understand what to do, what to prepare, and how to navigate common travel workflows in China.

cta.title: Prepare your China trip with fewer unknowns
cta.description: Get the guides, ask questions, and arrive better prepared.
